untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires precise candlestick morphology detection: (1) identifying a 'tall white candle' requires comparative body size analysis not available in allowed indicators, (2) detecting price opening/closing 'below the middle' of previous candle body requires mid-point calculation ((prev_open + prev_close)/2) which is not an allowed indicator, (3) identifying a 'doji' requires specific wick/body ratio detection not available, (4) 'uptrend leading to pattern' requires trend confirmation beyond simple moving average crossing. The pattern is inherently visual/morphological and cannot be fully expressed with the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses: prev_close > prev_open to detect the tall white candle, open < pivot to approximate 'below middle' opening, and close < sma_5 to detect downside close. However, this is a significant simplification and does not capture the precise geometric requirements of the Below-the-Stomach pattern. A proper implementation would require candlestick body mid-point calculations and comparative candle size metrics.
